## Validation Commands

- [ ] Ran `.\scripts\check-skill.ps1` or `pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/check-skill.ps1`
- [ ] Ran Codex Skill validator when available for Codex-specific validation
- [ ] Ran Claude Code smoke install when Claude Code support or docs changed
- [ ] Documentation uses separate English and `.zh-CN.md` files
- [ ] Skill behavior changes update references, templates, README, and validation script
